creator: shigeya@wide.ad.jp
text:
nvi-m17n's original repository site was hosted by ftp.foretune.co.jp
The server is now retired and should point to valid location.

Several years ago, itojun and I have discussed this change, 
and moved the repository to itojun.org.
The repository location was fixed for NetBSD Package, but
it was not happened for FreeBSD ports.

Since ftp.itojun.org is still active, and NetBSD package's description still
point to the server, as a tentative solution, adjust FreeBSD ports'
reference to NetBSD package location.

Fix: Patch to the Makefile attached.


Patch attached with submission follows:
